title: Fix #310: pre-mutation stage-gate scope (exclude-docs, cross-language)
context: Onboarded projects can be any stack (Laravel app/*.php, Python, Go). Allowlisting src/+tests under-gates non-JS code. Instead the gate fires for any edit whose target is NOT documentation (docs/**, *.md) or framework-internal (.paqad/**). Docs-only / non-feature-dev work (questions, RCA, pentest, design-test) does not fire the code stages.

options.label: Fire for any non-docs, non-.paqad edit (language-agnostic, fail-closed for code)

rationale: Cross-language onboarded projects; gate fires for any non-docs, non-.paqad edit. Deterministic + fail-closed for code. Prompt/lane-based skip (RCA/pentest/question) deferred as a larger non-deterministic follow-up.
